serverInfo.name: uap-pulse
serverInfo.title: UAP Pulse — declassified Pentagon UAP files
serverInfo.description: Search and map 222 declassified U.S. government UAP/UFO records (PURSUE Release, war.gov, 1944–2026). Public domain, no auth.

tools.name: search_sightings
tools.description: Search records by free text, agency, file type, year range, or location.

tools.name: search_nearby
tools.description: Incidents within a radius (km) of a lat/lng, by distance.

tools.name: get_sighting
tools.description: Full record for one file id, with the war.gov source link.

tools.name: full_text_search
tools.description: Relevance-ranked substring search across all records.

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Totals and breakdowns by agency, type, era.

tools.name: timeline
tools.description: Record counts per decade or year.

tools.name: timeline_data
tools.description: Per-period records with coordinates for animation.
